## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew build` passes locally (unit + Testcontainers integration tests)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Redis read-modify-write logic remains atomic (Lua) where applicable
- [ ] No business logic added to controllers
- [ ] Public classes/methods have Javadoc
- [ ] Updated documentation (README / config) if behaviour changed
